final:
module RefModule (
    input [7:0] d,
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [7:0] q
);

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) 
            q <= 8'b0;
        else
            q <= d;
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
